qualifiers.title: SLICE LEAGUE €1000 - QUALIFIER #1
qualifiers.description:
SLICE LEAGUE €1000 - QUALIFIER #1


 Join the discord server to participate in the tournament, it is mandatory to have all the information and for tournament support.


1 BELGIAN PLAYER MIN. PER TEAM (OTHERWISE =DQ)

Players who qualed for more than 1 MF can't participate


Starr Nova, Lola and Bolt are banned!


Power League Format :

Top 128 - Top 64 : Bo1 of Bo3

Top 64 - Semi finals : Bo3 of Bo3

Final : Bo5 of Bo3


Set 1: Gem Grab or Bounty

Set 2: Brawl Ball or Knock-out

Set 3: Heist or Hot zone

Set 4: Bounty or Heist or Brawl Ball

Set 5: Gem Grab or Hot Zone or Knock-out


The game modes and maps you can encounter are:

 Gem Grab : Gem Fort | Hard Rock Mine | Crystal Arcade

 Brawl Ball : Pinball Dreams | Pinhole Punt | Triple Dribble

 Knockout : Belle's rock | Goldarm Gulch | Out in the Open

 Hot Zone : Open Business | Duelings Beetles | Ring of Fire

 Heist : Pit Stop | Safe Zone | Kaboom Canyon

 Bounty : Hideout | Layer Cake | Dry Season


The maps were chosen based on the BSC 2026 Summer Split Map Pool and will be chosen randomly during the tournament.


✅How to join the room? You just have to wait in the game menu and an invitation will be sent to you automatically !

🎫If you have a problem during the tournament, please read all the information on the discord server and open a ticket.
